start.speaker: Trial Judge
start.text: You disturb the fair by desiring what we do not sell.
start.text_zh: 你扰乱了这集市——因为你渴慕的，是我们不贩卖的东西。

text_variants.text: You disturb the fair by desiring what we do not sell. The Interpreter warned you of this very street, did he not? And still you came — and still you will not buy.
text_variants.text_zh: 你扰乱了这集市——因为你渴慕的，是我们不贩卖的东西。解经者早警戒过你这条街，不是吗？你竟还是来了——竟还是不肯买。

text_variants.text: You disturb the fair by desiring what we do not sell. You bested the Destroyer with a blade — but here there is nothing to strike, only a price to refuse. Will you?
text_variants.text_zh: 你扰乱了这集市——因为你渴慕的，是我们不贩卖的东西。你曾以刀胜过那毁灭者——可这里无物可砍，只有一个价码任你拒绝。你拒不拒？

verdict.speaker: Trial Judge
verdict.text: The fair has heard enough. Faithful is condemned — yet he looks past us, as though the verdict were already overturned in a higher court.
verdict.text_zh: 集市已经听够了。忠信被定了罪——他却越过我们望出去，仿佛这判决，早已在更高的法庭上被推翻。

choices.text: Mark what Faithful would not sell, and carry it on.
choices.text_zh: 记住忠信不肯出卖的，把它带在身上走下去。
